Package com.airtribe.meditrack.entity

Class Doctor

java.lang.Object
com.airtribe.meditrack.entity.MedicalEntity
com.airtribe.meditrack.entity.Person
com.airtribe.meditrack.entity.Doctor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Searchable, Serializable
public class Doctor extends Person
Doctor entity representing a healthcare professional with type-safe specialization.
